messages.content: 帮我翻译一下接下来的段落。
当然，我可以帮你翻译。请提供接下来的段落。
在乒乓实验中，我们观察到了非恒定ecd曲线的散点图分布。
In the ping pong experiment, we observed a scattered distribution of data points on the non-constant ECD curve.
在乒乓实验中，我们统计了同一个分子在再捕获过程中的散点图分布。
In the ping pong experiment, we conducted a statistical analysis of the scattered distribution of data points for the same molecule in the re-capture process.
在再捕获实验中，我们统计了同一个分子在连续捕获过程中的散点图分布。
In the re-capture experiment, we conducted a statistical analysis of the scattered distribution of data points for the same molecule in the continuous capture process.
在再捕获实验中，我们分析了同一分子在连续捕获过程中的散点图，观察到不同于逆曲线模式的分布。

In the re-capture experiment, we analyzed the scattered distribution of data points for the same molecule in the continuous capture process and observed a distribution that was different from the inverse curve pattern.
分子状态的改变
Change in molecular state
我们也观察到了分子状态的转变
We also observed a transition/change in the molecular state.
第一种是单个柔软线性双链DNA分子的连续穿孔的散点图分布。
The first type is the scattered distribution of continuous puncturing of individual flexible linear double-stranded DNA molecules.
在两个不同的纳米孔（即两次再捕获实验中），我们都观察到相似的散点图特征，即抛物线型。
In two different nanopores (i.e., in two separate re-capture experiments), we observed similar features in the scattered distribution of data points, which displayed a parabolic shape.
在两个不同的纳米孔中(即在两个单独的重捕获实验中)，我们均观察到单个分子的散点图分布具有相似的特征，即呈现抛物线形状。

Apologies for the earlier confusion. In two separate re-capture experiments involving two different nanopores, we observed a similar characteristic in the scattered distribution of data points for individual molecules. Specifically, the distribution exhibited a parabolic shape.
这种分布代表着这一分子以不同的折叠构型（即不同的折叠位置，不同的折叠次数）进行穿孔。电流直方图的统计也可以证明这一点。

This distribution indicates that the molecule undergoes puncturing with different folding conformations (i.e., different folding positions and frequencies). This observation is further supported by the statistical analysis of the current histograms.
这种分布表明分子以不同的折叠构象(即不同的折叠位置和不同的折叠次数)通过孔。对电流直方图的统计分析进一步支持了这一结论。

This distribution indicates that the molecule passes through the pore with different folding conformations, including different folding positions and frequencies. The statistical analysis of the current histograms further supports this conclusion.
这种分布表明分子以不同的折叠构象(即不同的折叠位置和不同的折叠次数)通过孔。对当前直方图的统计分析进一步支持了这一结论。

This distribution suggests that the molecule passes through the pore with various folding conformations, including different folding positions and frequencies. The statistical analysis of the current histogram further bolsters this conclusion.
通过对每个穿孔信号进行电流直方图统计，表明这类分子在以不同的折叠构象（即不同的折叠位置和不同的折叠次数）进行穿孔。

By performing current histogram analysis on each puncturing signal, it is evidenced that molecules of this type undergo puncturing with different folding conformations, including distinct folding positions and frequencies.
我们对单个分子的连续穿孔信号做了电流直方图统计，并观察了每个穿孔信号的真实电流轨迹。结果表明，在重复捕获过程中，分子会以不同的折叠构型（即不同的折叠位置和不同的折叠次数）进行穿孔。

We performed current histogram analysis on the continuous puncturing signals of individual molecules and observed the real-time current trajectory of each puncturing event. The results indicated that during the repetitive re-capture process, molecules exhibited puncturing with different folding conformations, including varying folding positions and frequencies.
我们统计了单个分子连续穿孔信号的电流直方图，并观察了每个穿孔信号的真实电流轨迹。结果表明，在重复捕获过程中，分子会以不同的折叠构型（即不同的折叠位置和不同的折叠次数）进行穿孔。

We conducted statistical analysis on the current histogram of the continuous puncturing signals of individual molecules and observed the actual current trajectories of each puncturing event. The results revealed that during the repetitive re-capture process, molecules exhibited puncturing with different folding conformations, including varying folding positions and frequencies.
我们对单个分子连续穿刺信号的电流直方图进行了统计分析，并观察了每个穿刺事件的实际电流轨迹。
We performed a statistical analysis on the current histogram of the continuous puncturing signals of individual molecules and observed the actual current trajectory of each puncturing event.
